{{Quote|Look at the carnage! Maybe they'll wipe themselves out - save us a lot of trouble!|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />}}
The '''Second Battle of Coruscant''' was a lengthy conflict in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] waged between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Imperial Coalition]]. Inspired by the recent [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] led by the now deceased Grand Admiral Thrawn, a massive Imperial force [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|bombarded]] both Republic and Imperial [[Imperial Military/Legends|forces]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] shields, ultimately forcing [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] to evacuate the [[Capital/Legends|capital]]; however, once they acquired their prize, the Coalition fell upon each other in what became known as the '''[[Imperial Civil War|Imperial Mutiny]]'''.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|Coruscant is surrounded. Our defenses have been forced to retreat, and we estimate the planetary shield will fail by morning.|[[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]|<ref name="Retreat" />}}
Within days of [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] death, and inspired by what he had accomplished with so little in such a short amount of time, the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] and six former [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] commanders agreed to [[Imperial Coalition|unite]] for an attack into the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Alix Balan]] was placed in command of the overall assault.<ref name="DE Sourcebook" />

The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was no match for the military might of the Imperial Coalition with its [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] facing enough problems in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], and after a short and decisive campaign, the Empire had retaken several key New Republic systems in the Core including [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]], [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]], and [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].<ref name="DE Sourcebook" />

==The battle==
===Conquest of Coruscant===
This forced [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] to consider a last-minute plan for the defense of the galactic capital [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. However, she never got a chance, since the combined Imperial armada began bombarding Coruscant's [[Deflector shield/Legends|energy shield]] from orbit, causing heavy damage to the heavily populated ecumenopolis below.<ref name="TEC" /> The Imperial Coalition' first target were Coruscant's comm centers, knocking out the ability of the capital to communicate to its forces throughout the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] and requiring a number of commandeered courier ships, including the [[Messenger (starship)|''Messenger'']], to break through the blockade and send word.<ref name="Retreat" />

Mon Mothma ordered a general evacuation of the entire population of the capital, carried out by [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]. Thus, the Imperial Coalition had taken its Center and the New Republic resorted to guerrilla fighting.<ref name="TEC" />

===Imperial civil war===
However, after Coruscant had been retaken, the Council decided that it was time to elect a new [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]]. The various [[Admiral/Legends|admirals]], [[General/Legends|generals]], [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]], [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]], [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]], and [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] officials disagreed, and an armed conflict (the "[[Imperial Civil War]]") soon broke out amongst the various Imperial factions on Coruscant.<ref name="TEC" />

Meanwhile, the New Republic was quick to take advantage of the chaos caused by the warring Imperial factions and conducted raids on Imperial territories through the use of two captured [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] from earlier battles.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

One such raid over a devastated Coruscant ended in disaster when the New Republic [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']], under the command of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], crash-landed on the war torn cityscape.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

===The rescue mission===
[[File:BattleDebris.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Battle debris above the planet.]]
In response, the New Republic dispatched a task force to rescue surviving crew of the ''Liberator'' under the command of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], her husband [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and the famous droid [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. It consisted of the famous [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and two [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]] ''[[Rebel Star]]'' and ''[[Antares Six]]''.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

These two escort frigates were under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Huoba Neva]] and Captain [[Syub Snunb]] respectively. Having exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the task force came across the wreckage of a massive space battle around the orbit of Coruscant.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

Unfortunately, Neva's frigate ''Rebel Star'' collided with the space wreckage and was destroyed. While the ''Antares Six'' waited in orbit above the planet, the ''Falcon'' entered Coruscant. While on the way, they encountered a squadron of elite Imperial [[I-7 Howlrunner]]s. However, having arrived on the outskirts of a war-torn [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]], the fighters disappeared.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

Having followed Luke's coordinates, the ''Millennium Falcon'' arrived in the middle of a fierce battle between the various Imperial factions. Near the old [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] was the wreckage of the [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']]. For the surviving crew, the ''Falcon's'' arrival was a relief since they were besieged by formidable [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] walkers.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

Han and Leia quickly wiped out the Imperial walkers before proceeding to land near the wreckage. Upon landing, they were greeted by Lando Calrissian and Wedge Antilles along with the surviving New Republic troops which included [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] commandos. However, Luke was not present since he had sensed the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] in the Imperial Palace and had gone to investigate.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />
[[File:Ewoks_coruscant_battle.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Ewoks man a heavy infantry weapon]]

Suddenly, they were attacked by a gang of scavengers which deployed an armored tank and several war droids. The scavengers began looting the ''Falcon'' and also unleashed vicious [[Nek/Legends|Neks]]. However, Leia used the Force to confuse the neks and then hurl them while Han preferred finishing off the attacking droids and neks with his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

[[File:XR-85_Coruscant.jpg|thumb|right|200px|An [[XR-85 tank droid]] fights for one of the many Imperial factions]]
It was then that Luke reappeared from the wreckage of the Imperial Palace and used his growing Force powers to dispose off the remaining war droids. He then took on an AT-AT walker on his own and destroyed it as well. Following that, a small reunion took place in which Han, Leia and Luke embraced each other. Unfortunately for them, Luke revealed that he had sensed a great disturbance in the Force, which was actually being caused by Palpatine using his dark side powers to create a massive hyperspace wormhole.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

===The wormhole===
Meanwhile, the hyperspace wormhole appeared in orbit above Coruscant. This spectacle was witnessed by the crew of the ''Antares Six''. The wormhole then swept furiously across the war-torn surface. Luke quickly realized that it wanted only him and ordered his companions to leave immediately. Though Leia tried to persuade him to leave with them, Luke responded by saying that his destiny was not hers, and instructed her to protect her children.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

While his companions and the surviving Rebels fled on board the ''Falcon'', Luke remained with his faithful companion [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. Soon, the hyperspace wormhole came over him and swept him into space where he was funneled into an [[Lictor-class dungeon ship|Imperial Dungeon Ship]] bound for [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

==Aftermath==
The ''Millennium Falcon'' and the ''Antares Six'' returned to the [[Pinnacle Base|New Republic]] on [[Da Soocha V]]. Soon, across the Core, New Republic agents and [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] witnessed Imperial ships from every side of the conflict retreat into the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. This was reported to Admiral Ackbar who in turn reported it to Mon Mothma.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />

The surviving Imperial Coalition meanwhile learned that Palpatine had been reborn in a clone body. Under his orders, the Imperial fleet joined his [[Dark Empire]] and departed from the Core and began attacking New Republic worlds, including [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].<ref name="Dark Empire 1" /> General [[Alix Balan]] led a formal ceremony to reconsecrate Imperial City after the battle, an act which earned him fame throughout [[Imperial Space]] and included a triumphant parade<ref name="DE Sourcebook" /> by Balan's ground forces on the planet's grandest boulevards.<ref name="Warfare" />

Following the battle, the New Republic commander ordered [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to reform [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] into a more versatile, multi-fighter unit. [[Bahni]], an associate of historian [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]], believed the loss of Coruscant spelled the end of the New Republic.<ref name="DE Sourcebook" />

A New Republic soldier named [[Kinalos]] wrote about his experiences in the battle in ''[[The Year of Rage: A Citizen's History of the Coruscant Wars]]'', detailing his experience of returning to his [[Unidentified residential building (Coruscant)|destroyed home]].<ref name="Author'sCut">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-12-tales-of-the-new-republic|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 12: Tales of the New Republic}}</ref>
